# MDF Enterprises

> J&K's premier supplier of sports goods, fitness equipment, musical instruments and custom awards since 1997. GeM-registered government supplier, MSME-certified. Serving 1000+ institutions across Jammu & Kashmir — Srinagar, Jammu, Baramulla, Anantnag, Kupwara, Sopore, Leh.

## About

- [Homepage](https://mdfenterprisesjk.in/): Full company overview, certifications, institutional client list, brands, and contact details.
- Founded: 1997 by Mr. Syed Mumtaz, Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir
- Certifications: GeM Registered Supplier (Government e-Marketplace), MSME Certified (Ministry of MSME, India)
- Institutions served: 1000+ including DYSO J&K, University of Kashmir, J&K Police, CRPF, Govt. Medical College Srinagar, SKUAST-Kashmir, DSEK, Cluster University Srinagar, School Education Department
- Installations completed: 500+ gymnasium fit-outs, music labs, sports courts across J&K

## Products & Services

- [Sports Goods](https://mdfenterprisesjk.in/products/sports): Cricket equipment (bats, balls, pads, helmets), football, badminton, volleyball, hockey, athletics, table tennis, and multi-sport gear from SG, YONEX, NIVIA, COSCO, STAG, SPARTAN, SS, JONEX, NETCO and 15+ other brands.
- [Fitness Equipment](https://mdfenterprisesjk.in/products/fitness): Gymnasium equipment, treadmills, multi-gyms, weight training sets, yoga mats, with in-house installation and AMC service.
- [Musical Instruments](https://mdfenterprisesjk.in/products/music): Instruments and complete music lab setup for schools under NEP 2020 — guitars, keyboards, tablas, harmoniums, and acoustic treatment.
- [Awards & Trophies](https://mdfenterprisesjk.in/products/awards): Custom trophies, medals, shields and recognition awards for schools, government events, and sports tournaments.

## Brands (Authorised Dealer)

SG, YONEX, NIVIA, COSCO, STAG, SPARTAN, SS, JONEX, NETCO, GM, BDM, NOVA FITNESS — 25+ premium brands. All stock genuine and sourced directly from manufacturers.

## Procurement

- **GeM Portal**: Registered supplier on Government e-Marketplace. Government departments, schools and institutions in J&K can procure directly via GeM.
- **L1 Tender Supply**: Participates in J&K government sports equipment tenders (JKTENDERS, CPPP). MSME-certified for tender preference.
- **Bulk Orders**: Contact +91 70062 52334 or mdfenterprisesjk@gmail.com for institutional bulk orders.
- **Installation**: In-house team for gymnasium fit-outs, sports court installation, music lab commissioning, and multi-activity zone setup.
- **AMC**: Annual Maintenance Contracts for gymnasium and fitness equipment across J&K.

## Service Area

Srinagar, Jammu, Baramulla, Anantnag, Kupwara, Sopore, Pulwama, Budgam, Kulgam, Ganderbal, Bandipora, Kargil, Leh — all districts of Jammu & Kashmir.

## Blog & Resources

- [Blog](https://mdfenterprisesjk.in/blog): Articles on sports equipment procurement, GeM portal guidance, gymnasium setup, cricket equipment selection, and J&K institutional supply.
- [GeM Procurement Guide](https://mdfenterprisesjk.in/blog/how-to-procure-sports-equipment-through-gem): Step-by-step guide for government institutions to procure sports goods through GeM.
- [Cricket Equipment Brands India 2026](https://mdfenterprisesjk.in/blog/best-cricket-equipment-brands-india-2026): Comparison of SG, SS, YONEX, NIVIA, COSCO for different playing levels.
- [School Gymnasium Setup Guide](https://mdfenterprisesjk.in/blog/setting-up-school-gymnasium-what-you-need): Equipment checklist and installation guide for school gymnasiums.
